query:
WITH input_data(user_id, name) AS (
  VALUES
    ($1::uuid, 'Uptime'),
    ($1::uuid, 'InteractiveExt'),
    ($1::uuid, 'Wootz'),
    ($1::uuid, 'Download'),
    ($1::uuid, 'Upload'),
    ($1::uuid, 'Latency'),
    ($1::uuid, 'Tasks')
)
SELECT
    a.id AS "id?",
    a.created_at AS "created_at?",
    a.user_id AS "user_id?",
    a.name AS "name?",
    a.value AS "value?",
    a.updated_at AS "updated_at?"
FROM aggregates a
JOIN input_data i USING (user_id, name)
